hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; grep -n "from '@prisma/client'" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "ERROR: Use @/app/generated/prisma/client instead of @prisma/client" || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; grep -n "cookies()" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "await" && echo "WARNING: cookies() must be awaited in Next.js 15" || true
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env(\..+)?$' && echo "Blocked: editing env files requires explicit user permission" && exit 2 || true

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; FIRST=$(echo "$CMD" | awk '{print $1}'); [ "$FIRST" != "git" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force|-f)|git push.*--delete|git push.*:[^/]|git reset --hard|git branch -D'; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(main|master)'; then echo "BLOCKED: Force-push to main/master is not allowed."; else echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous git operation requires explicit user approval: $CMD"; fi; exit 2; fi
